response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned generalist with ~18 years of software development, strong TypeScript/Node.js depth, and recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and his GenAI experience appears limited to roughly one year at re:cinq. There is no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or Python, and no clear evidence of leading technical discovery with enterprise customers at scale. He could grow into the role, but does not currently meet the core requirements for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI engineer.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow tooling experience directly relevant to the role's key technologies
Deep full-stack and systems breadth (web, embedded, low-latency microservices) with strong engineering-craft practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record via workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~1 year of GenAI work)
No evidence of vector database, RAG, or LLM evaluation/observability experience
Python is absent from the skill set, and enterprise customer-facing delivery experience is not demonstrated

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector DB and Python skills
